title: Dudu's Life Pack
description: A lightweight modpack designed for recreating the iconic Minecraft “Life Series” experience with friends - limited lives, close survival, and chaotic alliances all included.
body:
# Dudu’s Life Pack
This is a collection of mods built to replicate the _Life Series_ experience - limited lives, alliances, betrayal, and chaos - while keeping setup simple and performance smooth. It’s perfect for small servers or friend groups who want to experience the intense, unpredictable fun of Grian’s _Life Series_ in their own world.

## What You Get
- 🎯 **Core Experience:** The _Life Series_ mod (by Mat0u5) that handles lives and rules
- 🎙️ **Communication:** _Simple Voice Chat_ for proximity-based talking and immersive teamwork
- 🧰 **Quality-of-Life Tweaks:** _AppleSkin, Mouse Tweaks, Zoomify,_ and other small improvements
- ⚙️ **Performance Boosts:** _Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ModernFix_ for smoother gameplay
- ✨ **Visual Enhancements:** _Iris Shaders_ and _3D Skin Layers_ for extra style

## Why Use This Pack?
Instead of building your own setup from scratch, this pack gathers all the essential mods for a lightweight, ready-to-play _Life Series_ experience. It’s optimized for multiplayer, easy to host, and designed to keep the focus on fun, strategy, and chaos with friends.

## Notes
- Works best on client & server
- Recommended for _small multiplayer servers_
